text: *Fictional interview dataset for evaluation purposes only\.*
CAND\-102: Utility bill is older than 90 days relative to analyst review on 2026\-02\-04\. Need fresher address proof\. Provisional start approved, but closure not permitted\.

CAND\-104: Address proof not scanned into folder\. Analyst recalled seeing a council tax letter during live video call, but no copy retained\. Prior employment coverage incomplete; verbal confirmation from manager does not satisfy policy\.
CAND\-105: Candidate referenced updated visa and police certificate in email, but no files were stored in case folder\. Cannot verify\. Missing 18 months employment history\.
CAND\-106: Recruiter believes limited\-company structure removes individual right\-to\-work requirement\. Policy does not state this\.
Primary analyst reviews were performed between 2026\-02\-03 and 2026\-03\-03 depending on case\.
